name: ValueInvest Global KL
summary: ValueInvest Global is an open-ended equity mutual fund launched by Investeringsforeningen ValueInvest Danmark. The fund is managed by ValueInvest Asset Management S.A. It invests in public equity markets across the globe. The fund seeks to invest in value stocks of large cap companies. ValueInvest Global was formed on July 15, 1998 and is domiciled in Denmark.
